title: The Route to Big Mom
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on the route to big mom within the The Road Poneglyph and the Next Routes storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The logs of my log pose!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're not following them at all now... is that okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We met up with trafficy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: and happened to get our hands on a vivre card that led us to Zou.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Now, we've just happened to come across...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The information regarding the road Doneglyphs.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: According to what CroCus of Twin Capes told us,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: As long as you follow the logs, eventually, all the routes will collapse into one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So I assumed that was where Rafiel would be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Crocus, eh? Another nostalgic name!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What's that old geezer up to these days?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's doing fine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, he was when we saw him two years ago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He was always searching for this one pirate crew, I wonder if...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes! That would be my crew. They all died.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: EHHHH?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Did any of you hear a word I just said?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes, loud and clear. If you are curious as to what lies at the end of the route that the logs lead one on, you should go see for yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There is indeed a route upon which all three of these needles point to the same place!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: However... this journey that all of you are currently embarking on,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: has already made that destination redundant, if you will.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What do you mean?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Normally, at the destination to which those log needles point, you would normally first learn...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: of the mystery of the poneglyphs and the writing of the ancients!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Along with the civilization that birthed those stones in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: As well as the existence of the lost island, Rafiel!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Roger himself greatly revised the course of his journey after reaching that point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Crocus too was a member of the pirate King's crew. One of those who learned everything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: assuming he has no reason to hate you, I doubt he would lie to you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you the Navigator?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're doing quite a fine job.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Do not worry. You have not lost your way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Continue on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Okay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oi ol! I dunno what's goin' on, but our Navigator is something, isn't she!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I... I am aware I've been doing... :) At least an okay job, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's the Nazi- gator of the future pirate King for ya"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You lot really are a lively bunch, aren'tcha.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: enough with the slapping! That hurts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Seriously though... you guys are all so well connected with the legends...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That it's making my head spin. Just like back when we met Rayleigh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I too have made the acquaintance of this Roger. But I do not remember it very well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I was quite young.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I see... you don't remember- WAIT A SEC! You little liar!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Roger died almost 20 years ago! Who the hell are you confusing him with!?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: GORONYA NYANYANYA! LORD Oden's adventures...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: are truly a rich tale! One day, we shall tell it in its entirety!

summary: The Route to Big Mom: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
